name: Call-Of-Doodie
currentFocus: Session 59 implemented the standalone-domain migration repo-side: root Cloudflare Pages build, canonical callofdoodie.wtf metadata/share/PWA surfaces, runtime-scoped service worker, Cloudflare Pages workflow, Pages security headers, reusable Cloudflare/Namecheap cutover automation, and live Pages deploy at https://a660c406.call-of-doodie.pages.dev/. Custom apex remains blocked by Cloudflare zone-create permission and Namecheap NS/allowlist gates.
nextMilestone: S60: obtain broader Cloudflare zone-create token or manually add zones for callofdoodie.wtf + playcallofdoodie.com, switch Namecheap nameservers to the assigned Cloudflare NS pair, run platform/domain cutover scripts, verify canonical + backup redirects, then update Supabase/PostHog/Sentry/Ko-fi URL allowlists and old-path 301.
blockers: Cloudflare API tokens lack `com.cloudflare.api.account.zone.create` — founder must add both zones via dashboard or generate/store `CLOUDFLARE_ZONE_CREATE_TOKEN`
Namecheap API nameserver automation requires current public IP in the Namecheap API allowlist before next migration session
Custom apex domains still use Namecheap parking DNS until Cloudflare zones exist and nameservers are switched
